data.description_suggestion: Upload one or more files to the authenticated user's Neocities site. Accepts file content in multipart/form-data format. Supports multiple file uploads in a single request. Returns an ApiResponse confirming successful upload with file details. Overwrites existing files with the same name. Maximum file size and quantity limits may apply.

data.current_description: Remove specified files. Cannot delete index.html.
data.description_suggestion: Delete one or more files from the authenticated user's Neocities site. Requires a list of file paths to delete. Cannot delete index.html or other protected files. Returns an ApiResponse confirming successful deletion. Deleted files cannot be recovered.
